mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.real_name AS realName, u.email, u.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, u.nickname, u.is_active AS isActive FROM users u JOIN roles r ON u.role_id = r.role_id ORDER BY u.role_id, u.user_id

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.real_name AS realName, u.email, u.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, u.nickname, u.is_active AS isActive FROM users u JOIN roles r ON u.role_id = r.role_id ORDER BY u.role_id, u.user_id OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET role_id = #{roleId}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.course_id AS courseId, c.course_name AS courseName, c.course_code AS courseCode, c.semester, u.real_name AS teacherName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_enrollments ce WHERE ce.course_id = c.course_id) AS studentCount FROM courses c JOIN users u ON c.teacher_id = u.user_id ORDER BY c.course_id DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM appeals WHERE submission_id IN (SELECT submission_id FROM submissions WHERE assignment_id IN (SELECT assignment_id FROM assignments WHERE course_id = #{id}))

DELETE FROM review_scores WHERE review_id IN (SELECT r.review_id FROM reviews r JOIN peer_review_assignments pra ON r.pra_id = pra.pra_id WHERE pra.assignment_id IN (SELECT assignment_id FROM assignments WHERE course_id = #{id}))
DELETE FROM reviews WHERE pra_id IN (SELECT pra_id FROM peer_review_assignments WHERE assignment_id IN (SELECT assignment_id FROM assignments WHERE course_id = #{id}))
DELETE FROM peer_review_assignments WHERE assignment_id IN (SELECT assignment_id FROM assignments WHERE course_id = #{id})
DELETE FROM rubric_items WHERE rubric_id IN (SELECT rubric_id FROM rubrics WHERE assignment_id IN (SELECT assignment_id FROM assignments WHERE course_id = #{id}))
DELETE FROM rubrics WHERE assignment_id IN (SELECT assignment_id FROM assignments WHERE course_id = #{id})
DELETE FROM submissions WHERE assignment_id IN (SELECT assignment_id FROM assignments WHERE course_id = #{id})
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS userCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role_id=4) AS studentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role_id=2) AS teacherCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM courses) AS courseCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignments) AS assignmentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submissions) AS submissionCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE status='submitted') AS reviewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appeals WHERE status='pending') AS pendingAppeals
